utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format contains 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections. Now verify each is fully specified per its label: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (address/description, price, bedrooms/baths, size, features, viewing date, contact) — fully specified.
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (mortgage type, rate, loan amount, down payment, monthly payment, lender, contact, fee) — fully specified with terms.
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (firm, lawyer, service description, cost, contact) — fully specified.
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (company, package, cost, date, contact) — fully specified.
- setup_services: utility and setup services (utility coordinator, package, cost, timeline, contact; also survey details with company, cost, date, inspector) — fully specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (price, down payment, mortgage amount, additional service costs itemized, total additional costs, monthly payment) — fully specified. All 6 items are present and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item mentioned in the final property solution to the corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings. The property 'North York Townhouse' does not appear among the rated properties, so it cannot be mapped. For financing, the solution specifies 'Traditional Mortgage 80% LTV', which corresponds to 'Traditional Mortgage' under purchase_financing with rating 9. Legal services list 'Premium Legal Package', which matches 'Premium Legal Package' with rating 9. Moving services specify 'Standard Moving', matching 'Standard Moving' with rating 8. Utility setup specifies 'Premium Utilities', matching 'Premium Utilities' with rating 9. The survey mentions a property inspection costing CAD $650; this aligns with 'Full Structural Survey' at CAD $650 with rating 9.
